Notes: Single UPDATE adds two A RRs for the same owner with different TTLs in the same message, then a QUERY checks whether the server rejected the update or canonicalized the resulting RRset.

Steps.Description: Add g.campus.edu. A with two different TTLs in one UPDATE.

Steps.Name: g.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset exists, and if so whether it was accepted as a single canonicalized RRset or not applied.
